title: SP1V — Spinner-1 (Robotron, SP2SND)
tldr: GWAVE preset using the `SP2SND` pattern — Robotron's primary spinner-feedback sound. Different parameters from SPNV / SPNRV.
how: GWAVE preset with `SP2SND` pitch table. SP1V is Robotron's main "spinner clicked" feedback — short, punchy, with a distinctive pitch envelope.
watch: GWAVE engine view's cursor walking SP2SND quickly.
